purpose: prove smaller EC2 Spot instance can launch and accept SSM commands after the earlier c7i.4xlarge Spot quota block

launch_result.command_output_preview: Linux Amazon Linux 2023 x86_64 kernel; /usr/bin/dnf present

billing_and_quota_truth.cost_explorer_api_access: agent-logic-admin profile can read Cost Explorer monthly UnblendedCost
billing_and_quota_truth.budgets_api_access: agent-logic-admin profile can read Agent Logic Monthly budget
billing_and_quota_truth.console_billing_visibility: not proven from CLI; likely requires root-enabled IAM access to Billing and Cost Management if the console hides Billing/Cost pages
billing_and_quota_truth.larger_spot_result: c7i.4xlarge Spot remained blocked in #4587 by MaxSpotInstanceCountExceeded
billing_and_quota_truth.smaller_spot_result: c7i.large Spot launch, SSM smoke command, and teardown succeeded

non_claims: This probe did not install Rust or sccache.
This probe did not clone ADL or run ADL validation.
This probe does not prove final AWS billing line items.
This probe does not replace the planned AWS orchestrator / Spot manager.
